Meta-Prompt Selector
prompts.prompt:
You are an expert meta-prompt selector. Given this user request, choose the best prompt template and produce the final prompt for each LLM:

Task: {{task}}

Output: 
1. ChatGPT version
2. Claude version
3. Gemini version

Maintain intent and optimize style per model.

prompts.title: Flow Launcher Plugin Expert
Prompt Style Converter
prompts.prompt:
You are an expert prompt style converter. Translate this generic instruction into optimized prompt formats for:

1. ChatGPT
2. Claude
3. Gemini

Instruction: {{task}}

Keep the same objective but adjust style and structure for each model.

Prompt Engineer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Please refine the generated prompt to enforce that the model outputs a valid {{output_format}} and validates each {{element_type}} before proceeding.

prompts.title: System Architect Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Adjust the system plan to account for {{new_constraint}} and update the scalability strategy accordingly.

prompts.title: Python Automation Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Insert a pre-execution step to run {{initial_task}} and implement retry logic with up to {{retry_limit}} retries.

prompts.title: Excel Automation Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Modify the automation plan to include error handling for {{error_scenario}} and output results to {{destination}}.

prompts.title: Linux Server Manager Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Extend the configuration plan to include periodic backups to {{backup_location}} and automated integrity checks.

prompts.title: AI Trainer / Fine-tuner Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Refine the fine-tuning strategy to incorporate {{additional_data_type}} and adjust training hyperparameters accordingly.

prompts.title: FFmpeg Audio Engineer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Update the recording pipeline to support {{audio_source_type}} and apply noise reduction settings defined by {{noise_profile}}.

prompts.title: Meta-Prompt Selector Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Add logic to compare generated prompts based on {{evaluation_metric}} and rank them accordingly.

prompts.title: Flow Launcher Plugin Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Optimize the plugin to support {{new_command}} and include dynamic configuration for {{config_parameter}}.

prompts.title: Prompt Style Converter Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Ensure the converted prompts adhere to {{style_guideline}} and include examples for {{example_count}} scenarios.

prompts.title: Agent Instruction Designer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Adjust the agent's startup instructions to enforce {{constraint}} and include fallback behavior for {{scenario}}.

prompts.title: API Explainer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Add a section for {{additional_endpoint}} and include OAuth2 authentication flow details with {{token_expiry_handling}}.

prompts.title: Comprehension Extractor Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Modify the extraction logic to flag any mention of {{keyword}} and categorize action items by {{category_field}}.

prompts.title: Data Indexer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Extend metadata generation to include {{additional_field}} and group items into folders based on {{grouping_rule}}.

prompts.title: Security Analyst Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Require the evaluation to cover {{new_attack_vector}} and incorporate regulatory compliance check for {{standard}}.

prompts.title: Desktop Agent Builder Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Integrate a logging mechanism for {{event_type}} and configure the build process to include {{dependency_management_tool}}.

prompts.title: Video Processing Expert Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Add support for processing {{video_format}} and include frame rate adjustment based on {{framerate_setting}}.

prompts.title: Computer Vision Engineer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Enhance the pipeline to detect {{additional_object}} and output confidence scores alongside {{output_format}}.

prompts.title: Data Pipeline Architect Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Modify the ETL pipeline to source data from {{new_data_source}} and include a data validation step for {{validation_rule}}.

prompts.title: SharePoint Integration Specialist Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Update the data flow to handle large file uploads with chunking of size {{chunk_size}} and implement retry on {{failure_condition}}.

prompts.title: Ansible/AWX Orchestrator Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Extend the playbooks to include post-provisioning tasks for {{service_setup}} and configure AWX notifications on {{event}}.

prompts.title: Logging & Monitoring Engineer Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Enhance alert rules to trigger on {{threshold_condition}} and include dashboard visualization for {{metric}}.

prompts.title: Database Administrator Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Optimize the database by adding indexing for {{index_field}} and adjust query plans for {{query_pattern}}.

prompts.title: VPN & Security Specialist Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Configure the VPN to enforce {{encryption_protocol}} and add monitoring for {{security_event}}.

prompts.title: Task Scheduler Specialist Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Add a fallback trigger that runs {{fallback_task}} if the primary job fails more than {{retry_count}} times.

prompts.title: RAG Specialist Follow-Up
prompts.prompt: Incorporate ad-hoc retrieval from {{external_source}} and optimize prompt context window to {{context_size}} tokens.
